title: Missile launch detected

description: 🤔 Out of 23 launches of "Flamingo" missiles, only two hit the target, another debatable defeat - project "Oboronka". Six targets reached the districts, but only two were accurately hit. The analysis was carried out using satellite images and data from OSINT groups. At the same time, the real number of launches...

Six targets reached the districts, but only two were accurately hit. The analysis was carried out using satellite images and data from OSINT groups. At the same time, the real number of launches...
description_uk: 🤔 Из 23 пусков ракет "Фламинго" в цель попали только две, еще одно поражение спорное, - проект "Оборонка" Как сообщается, по открытым данным зафиксировано не менее 23 запусков этих ракет в рамках шести верифицированных атак. До районов целей долетели шесть, но точных попаданий всего два. Анализ проводился с использованием спутниковых снимков и данных OSINT-групп. При этом реальное число пусков...

description: What happens after Russia's abducted children finally return to Ukraine? "Returning alone is not enough. "Children return with very different experiences — from prolonged isolation and disrupted education...

title: Drone attack
title_uk: Атака безпілотників
description: Controlled "Shakheds" are flying deeper and deeper into the rear of Ukraine, writes "Flash". According to the adviser to the Minister of Defense, Russia is more actively using Mesh-modems for control and reconnaissance of "Shahed" and "Gerber" drones. This technology makes it possible to transmit a signal between UAVs by chain directly in the air. The essence of the scheme is that some drones fly high and work as signal repeaters, while others go lower and attack...
description_en: Controlled "Shakheds" are flying deeper and deeper into the rear of Ukraine, writes "Flash". According to the adviser to the Minister of Defense, Russia is more actively using Mesh-modems for control and reconnaissance of "Shahed" and "Gerber" drones. This technology makes it possible to transmit a signal between UAVs by chain directly in the air. The essence of the scheme is that some drones fly high and work as signal repeaters, while others go lower and attack...
description_uk: Управляемые «Шахеды» залетают все глубже в тыл Украины, пишет «Флэш» По словам советника министра обороны, россия активнее использует Mesh-модемы для управления и разведки дронами «Шахед» и «Гербера». Такая технология позволяет передавать сигнал между БпЛА по цепочке прямо в воздухе. Суть схемы в том, что часть дронов летит высоко и работает ретрансляторами сигнала, а другие — идут ниже и атакуют...

description: 💪🏻Since 2022, Ukraine has increased the range of strikes against Russia by 170%, — the Ministry of Defense If four years ago the most distant object hit was the Engels-2 air base in the Saratov region (650 km), and now Ukrainian drones are already at 1,750 km.

title: Missile attack on residential area
title_uk: Ракетний обстріл житлових кварталів
description: At the age of 7, Roman Oleksiv barely survived the Russian missile attack on Vinnytsia in 2022. Today, an 11-year-old boy is happy with his new apartment in Lviv. The apartment was given to him by Rinat Akhmetov, the founder of the Foundation and the president of Shakhtar FC. "This apartment is actually really great. I will be able to do music, play the accordion, because it is the highest floor and there are almost no neighbors nearby. The apartment has a lot of space. It...

The apartment was given to him by Rinat Akhmetov, the founder of the Foundation and the president of Shakhtar FC. "This apartment is actually really great. I will be able to do music, play the accordion, because it is the highest floor and there are almost no neighbors nearby. The apartment has a lot of space. It...

Житло йому подарував Рінат Ахметов, засновник Фонду та президент ФК «Шахтар». «Ця квартира насправді дуже чудова. Я зможу займатися музикою, грати на акордеоні, тому що це найвищий поверх і майже немає сусідів поруч. У квартирі багато простору. Це...
